3307370.name: Fool's Guild Demo
3307370.description:
Fool’s Guild is an idle incremental game with deep crafting mechanics, where you build, manage, and expand your own guild at your own pace.

Defeat monsters to collect valuable loot, grow crops, cook food, mine resources, and forge powerful equipment. Decide whether to equip your guild members to tackle greater challenges or sell crafted items for Fool’s Coins to unlock permanent upgrades and accelerate your progress.

Unlike traditional idle games, Fool’s Guild runs beneath your desktop, allowing your guild to work while you focus on other tasks. Leave the game running in the background, check in whenever you want, fine-tune your production chains, and steadily optimize your strategy without interrupting your routine.

Plan efficient crafting routes, balance your economy, and watch a humble guild of fools evolve into an unstoppable powerhouse — all while the game quietly progresses alongside your day.
3307370.supported_languages: 英语, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西

categories.description: 无需应对快速反应事件
